problem id: 88872de7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR NOT SHL(7)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  00010111 -> 00000001
  11000000 -> 00001100
  10011001 -> 10001001
  10111110 -> 00001011
  00000101 -> 00000000
  10101100 -> 00001010
  11011001 -> 10001101
  01110111 -> 00000111
  01001001 -> 10000100
  00001001 -> 10000000

query: 00100010
predicted answer: 00000010
